title: Synergy between NP and HEP research goals and efforts in fundamental symmetries and interactions
author_string: Tanmoy Bhattacharya, Rajan Gupta, Kate Scholberg
abstract: The aim of this white paper is to highlight several areas for which the Department of Energy's Office of Nuclear Physics has primary stewardship or significant investment and expertise, and for which there is also significant interest and expertise within the HEP community. These areas of overlap offer exciting opportunities for collaboration.
comment: 8 pages. White paper submitted to the Nuclear Physics town hall meeting on Fundamental Symmetries as part of the Long Range Planning
